>更新时间：2026.07.11

# 微信支付 - 商户开户意愿确认（普通服务商）文档索引

> 商户开通微信支付的合规确认环节，用于核验商户真实开户意愿与主体身份，通过线上授权、扫码验证等方式完成确认，保障开户合规安全，是商户正常使用支付、结算等功能的必要前提，有效防范虚假开户与冒用开户风险。

## 接入指引
- [产品介绍](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012064820.md)
- [常见问题](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4016644196.md)
- [开发指引](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012064832.md)
- [开发接入准备](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012064824.md)
- [错误码](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4020807427.md)

## API 列表
- [提交申请单](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012722388.md)
- [撤销申请单](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012697627.md)
- [查询申请单审核结果](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012697715.md)
- [获取商户开户意愿确认状态](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012467549.md)
- [图片上传](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012760509.md)

## 请求示例
- [提交申请单 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012722388-curl.md)
- [提交申请单 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012722388-java.md)
- [提交申请单 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012722388-go.md)
- [撤销申请单 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012697627-curl.md)
- [撤销申请单 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012697627-java.md)
- [撤销申请单 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012697627-go.md)
- [查询申请单审核结果 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012697715-curl.md)
- [查询申请单审核结果 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012697715-java.md)
- [查询申请单审核结果 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012697715-go.md)
- [获取商户开户意愿确认状态 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012467549-curl.md)
- [获取商户开户意愿确认状态 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012467549-java.md)
- [获取商户开户意愿确认状态 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012467549-go.md)
